div1.entryFree: Forth, prepos. out of: steal f. thy father's house, Mids. I, 1, 164. drive the English f. the bounds of France, H6A I, 2, 54. he that loosed them f. their brazen caves, H6B III, 2, 89. issue f. their city, Cor. I, 4, 23. peered f. the golden window of the east, Rom. I, 1, 126. they have put f. the haven, Ant. IV, 10, 7.
